title: Crunchy Sesame Chicken Salad
ingredients: 1 8oz bag fresh sugar snap peas, strings removed
1 ¼ cups Asian toasted sesame dressing
instructions:
In a large serving bowl combine all the ingredients except the noodles and onions.
Toss the salad sprinkle the onions over the top and serve with the noodles on the side. (if tossed in the salad leftover s will have soggy noodles)
